paragraphs.text: Ladies and Gentlemen of the European Commission, thank you for addressing such an important issue. Companies have done many things in recent years, which have been very harmful to consumers, such as looot boxes in EA Games. In addition to these objects, I would advise you to include the destruction of video games. Video games are a kind of art on the sole basis that it is a combination of several forms of art. History corresponds to a book, paintings and viewing like theatre. It would be a shame and should be illegal if an author sells a painting, is able to take it away and destroy it autonomously. I would therefore ask you to include in your initiative that video games cannot simply be destroyed. Safeguards should be in place to protect the works of art of our time.
